text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm... finally... finished. Fifty sprints down!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I feel so heavy... and my legs are like jelly!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is this scale broken or something? When did I put
on all this weight?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I have to lose it! And no one can ever
know!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll never become a top Umadol if I just mope
around!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll lose the extra weight and be right back to
being everybody's lovable Falco in no time!

Afterward, Smart Falcon's efforts pay off and she
successfully returns to her target weight!
